mapping.a_element: bosonic cavity-mode creation/annihilation operators obeying the CCR
mapping.b_element: CCR whose representations are being constructed

brief_justification: Paper A's machinery is a microscopic derivation of an open-system Lindblad-type master equation with a dissipator retained beyond the Rotating Wave Approximation (dynamics/dissipation of a lossy Jaynes-Cummings system), whereas paper B's machinery is the algebraic construction of reducible representations of CAR/CCR to second-quantize Dirac/Maxwell fields into a finite QFT; the only overlap is the shared appearance of canonical commutation relations, which is vocabulary rather than a common governing process, so no role-for-role mapping of the driving mechanism holds.
